name: Turkey Tetrazzini
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/4 cup butter in a heavy saucepan. Stir in flour and cook for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
2. Add broth, sherry, cream, and oregano. Cook until the mixture boils, stirring constantly.
3. Add 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese and stir until melted. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. Melt remaining butter with olive oil in a skillet. Add garlic, scallions, parsley, and mushrooms. Saute until mushrooms are browned. Remove from heat.
5. Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente. Drain well.
6. Combine sauce, sauteed ingredients, cooked spaghetti, and turkey in a bowl. Season with salt to taste.
7. Pour the mixture into a greased casserole dish and sprinkle with remaining Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake at 375 degrees for 15 minutes, or until bubbly.
